title: Grandma Gifts, Light Up Photo Frame Gifts for Grandma from Grandkids, Great Grandma Christmas Birthday Gifts, 6x4 inch Picture Frame Nanny Gifts from Grandchildren Presents for Grandma
features: 【Best grandma gifts】: Bathed in a warm yellow halo, your photo and the scene at that time are lifelike. This photo frame illuminates vivid memories full of love and happiness. Give this photo frame to your grandma as a gifts for grandma, grandma Christmas gifts, nanny gifts, grandma birthday gifts, great grandma gifts, presents for grandma, or gran gifts, and let them feel your heartfelt and unfailing love!

【Light up photo frame】: This photo frame is not like a normal photo frame that only displays photos, but also has a light on the back of the word. The left side of the photo frame has a one-touch on/off button on the back, which makes it easy to turn the light on and off(batteries not included). In a dimly lit room, the lighted photo frame on the desktop emits a warm and soft glow, injecting warmth into a long night and creating a cosy and comfortable atmosphere.

【Warm words】: The left side of the frame is engraved with the heart-warming words "Grandma, you have loved me since I was born, but I have loved you my whole entire life. I love you." This frame is a particularly romantic way of expressing your genuine care and love, and you can tell your grandma how much you love her.

【Premium material】: This photo frame is made from high quality wood and the lettering on the left side is created using advanced laser engraving techniques. The picture frame is sturdy and durable and will preserve your precious memories for a long time. You can place this photo frame in your living room, bookshelf, desk, bedside table, bedroom, etc. Definitely the perfect lifetime keepsake photo frame to display your precious memories!

【Size】: The left side of the picture frame has delicate engraving and the right side holds a photo. This frame is openable and foldable and holds a 4x6 inch photo perfectly. The photo frame stands easily on a table and has 4 easy-to-open tabs on the back to ensure easy photo changes and a tight closure.
